title: BBAI Stock Slips As Mixed Q1 Numbers Rattle Traders
text: BBAI stock slipped as mixed Q1 numbers rattled traders. The combination of revenue beat but earnings miss created confusion about the company's operational progress. While backlog growth and margin expansion are positive indicators, the continued operating losses and negative adjusted EBITDA raised questions about the timeline to profitability. Traders focused on the negative EPS surprise despite the revenue beat.
